overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, long dining tables with seated figures, and large stained glass windows at the far end. The scene is rendered in a game engine with high-quality lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles and house banners

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from a fixed position on the right side of the chamber

entered.detail: massive cylindrical stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling in the foreground
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall emitting colorful light
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
wooden banquet tables lined with seated figures and food settings
tall arched windows along the left wall letting in natural daylight
gothic stone arches framing the distant left side of the hall

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of the grand hall from a fixed position on the right side, showing the stone pillars in the foreground, rows of dining tables with seated individuals in the middle ground, and the illuminated stained glass window at the far end. Floating candles hang from the ceiling providing warm ambient light throughout the gothic interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric gaze across a grand gothic dining hall that emphasizes the depth and scale of the interior. It begins from a fixed position on the right side, framing the scene through massive stone pillars that anchor the foreground. The view then extends across the middle ground, where rows of dining tables filled with seated figures are bathed in the warm, flickering glow of floating candles. Finally, the perspective draws the eye toward the far end of the hall, where a large, illuminated stained glass window casts a soft light over the entire architectural space.
